children.name: .github
children.purpose: CI/CD GitHub Actions workflows

children.name: ci.yaml
children.purpose: Lint, test, and validate Dagster definitions on every push and PR

children.name: deploy.yml
children.purpose: Serverless production deploy to Dagster Cloud on push to main

children.name: branch_deployments.yml
children.purpose: Serverless branch deploy to Dagster Cloud on PR open/sync

children.name: docs
children.purpose: Learning and reference notes

children.name: structure.json
children.purpose: This file — canonical directory structure reference

children.name: expectations
children.purpose: Great Expectations suite definitions (JSON config, not Python)

children.name: flight_data_suite.json
children.purpose: Expectation suite for bronze flight data validation

children.name: infra
children.purpose: Terraform IaC — provisions GCP resources (BigQuery datasets, GCS bucket, IAM)

children.name: main.tf
children.purpose: Resource definitions

children.name: outputs.tf
children.purpose: Output values (bucket name, dataset IDs)

children.name: variables.tf
children.purpose: Input variable declarations

children.name: models
children.purpose: Placeholder for locally exported model artifacts — production models live in GCS and MLflow

children.name: serving
children.purpose: Standalone FastAPI microservice — real-time inference gateway, deployed independently from Dagster

children.name: app.py
children.purpose: FastAPI app entrypoint, startup loads Champion model from MLflow registry

children.name: models.py
children.purpose: Pydantic request/response schemas

children.name: predict.py
children.purpose: Feature engineering and model inference logic

children.name: src/quickstart_etl
children.purpose: Main Dagster Python package

children.name: definitions.py
children.purpose: Dagster entry point — merges all assets, resources, schedules, sensors, jobs into one Definitions object

children.name: partitions.py
children.purpose: Shared DailyPartitionsDefinition used across all asset groups

children.name: py.typed
children.purpose: PEP 561 marker — declares this package as typed

children.name: defs
children.purpose: All Dagster definitions — convention enforced by the dg CLI

children.name: assets
children.purpose: Asset definitions organised by pipeline stage (medallion layers)

children.name: ingestion.py
children.purpose: Bronze — ingest raw flight data and external signals from APIs/GCS into BigQuery

children.name: validation.py
children.purpose: Bronze — run Great Expectations suites on bronze tables, fail on violations

children.name: features.py
children.purpose: Silver — feature engineering: lag features, rolling stats, holiday/weather joins

children.name: training.py
children.purpose: Gold — model training with LightGBM/XGBoost, hyperparameter tuning via Optuna, logs to MLflow

children.name: serving.py
children.purpose: Gold — promote Champion model in MLflow registry after training passes quality gates

children.name: monitoring.py
children.purpose: Gold — compute drift metrics via Evidently, write results to BigQuery for alerting

children.name: resources
children.purpose: Dagster resource definitions — external service clients injected into assets

children.name: storage.py
children.purpose: BigQueryResource (explicit queries) and BigQueryPandasIOManager (DataFrame persistence)

children.name: mlflow_resource.py
children.purpose: MLflow tracking and model registry resource

children.name: dask_resource.py
children.purpose: Dask distributed compute resource for large-scale feature engineering

children.name: sensors
children.purpose: Dagster sensors — event-driven pipeline triggers

children.name: drift_sensors.py
children.purpose: Monitors drift metrics in BigQuery, triggers retraining job when drift exceeds threshold

children.name: lib
children.purpose: Shared helper functions — not Dagster definitions, reused across assets and serving

children.name: feature_logic.py
children.purpose: Canonical feature engineering logic shared between training assets and the FastAPI serving layer to eliminate training-serving skew

children.name: tests
children.purpose: Pytest test suite

children.name: test_defs.py
children.purpose: Validates that the full Definitions object loads without errors

children.name: test_ingestion.py
children.purpose: Unit tests for ingestion assets

children.name: test_features.py
children.purpose: Unit tests for feature engineering logic

children.name: test_training.py
children.purpose: Unit tests for model training assets

children.name: test_serving.py
children.purpose: Unit tests for FastAPI serving endpoints

children.name: test_monitoring.py
children.purpose: Unit tests for drift monitoring assets

children.name: .env.example
children.purpose: Template for local .env — copy and fill with real values, never commit .env

children.name: .pre-commit-config.yaml
children.purpose: Pre-commit hooks: ruff lint (--fix) and ruff format on every commit

children.name: dagster_cloud.yaml
children.purpose: Dagster Cloud code location config — maps module_name to the Python package

children.name: docker-compose.yml
children.purpose: Local development stack (MLflow, serving container)

children.name: Makefile
children.purpose: Convenience targets for common dev commands

children.name: pyproject.toml
children.purpose: Project metadata, dependencies, ruff config, pytest config

children.name: uv.lock
children.purpose: Locked dependency versions for reproducible installs — always committed
